items.title: OpenAI Aggressively Expands Ads Pilot to More Countries
items.desc: Just two days after OpenAI launched its self-service ads platform in the U.S., the ChatGPT maker said it will expand its ads pilot to the UK, Japan, South Korea, Brazil, and Mexico markets in the coming weeks.

items.title: Permutive Recruits Former IPG Mediabrands CEO to Board in Buy-Side Push
items.desc: Eileen Kiernan will help the sell-side tech provider ramp up business with advertisers  and agencies

items.title: Amazon Bets AI Can Rewrite the Upfront Playbook in a Fragmented TV Market
items.desc: Alan Moss previews Amazon's upfront pitch, including live sports sponsorships, agentic shopping, and 'reinventing' its partnerships.

items.title: Timothée Chalamet Builds His Dream Soccer Team in Adidas’ World Cup Short
items.desc: The 5-minute spot kicks off the shoe brand's Tier-1 sponsorship of the tournament

items.title: Vox Media Welcomes a Bidding War
items.desc: James Murdoch is the latest suitor to eye the empire. What does that mean for the rest of the portfolio?

items.title: CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies at 87
items.desc: Turner pioneered the 24-hour news network, fundamentally changing the news industry.

items.title: New Disney CEO Reveals the AI Enhancements Coming to Disney+
items.desc: In his first earnings call, CEO Josh D'Amaro calls Disney+ the 'digital centerpiece' of the company.

items.desc: Still, Criteo's growth numbers remain plagued by two major client losses.
